transfer_contract.compute_input_policy: Mount or read only verified immutable inputs or accession views that resolve to verified immutable inputs.
transfer_contract.compute_workdir_policy: Copy mutable working sets to SLURM_TMPDIR before compute stages write temporary data.
transfer_contract.compute_network_policy: Compute arrays never download biological payloads or reach out to providers.
transfer_contract.output_validation_policy: Validate outputs in scratch or staging, then atomically promote only validated final outputs into pilot/outputs.
transfer_contract.cleanup_scope_policy: Directory scans and cleanup must remain inside the configured VGP_DATA_ROOT and may not traverse unrelated project data.
